name: OWNER-REMITTANCE-NOTIFY
epic: owner / property-manager-company model — phase 4 (proactive comms: remittance advice + notifications)
summary: Makes the owner relationship proactive instead of pull-only. When the PM records a payout, the owner gets a remittance advice (PDF email) + an in-app notification; emailing a statement also drops an in-app notice. Adds an owner notifications surface (page + unread badge) and two owner-facing notification types with opt-out preferences. Plus a seeded owner test login for the dev dashboards.

findings.title: owner notification types + in-app-only dispatch helper
findings.detail: Migration widens notifications.type ENUM (+owner_payout_sent, +owner_statement_sent) + notification_preferences.{owner_payout_sent_enabled,owner_statement_sent_enabled} (default true). Notification constants + TYPE_URGENCY_MAP (INFORMATIONAL). NotificationPreference fillable/casts. NotificationDefaults DEFAULT_TYPE_SETTINGS. NotificationService::notifyInApp() — a public IN-APP-ONLY dispatch (createNotification channel=in_app + sendInApp broadcast) so the companion notice never sends a 2nd email (the document has its own mailable); honors canReceive for an EXISTING preference, defaults-on for a brand-new one (a fresh firstOrCreate row's DB-default columns aren't hydrated in memory, so gating only an existing pref avoids silently dropping a new owner's first notice). landlordId passed explicitly (resolveLandlordId returns the recipient's own id for non-tenants).

findings.title: payout remittance advice (PDF email) + dispatch + resend
findings.detail: OwnerPayoutMail (mirrors OwnerStatementMail: ShouldQueue+afterCommit, markdown email + Attachment::fromData lazy PDF reports.owner-payout-advice, failed() handler). emails.subjects.owner_payout_advice + emails/owner-payout + reports/owner-payout-advice blades. OwnerPayoutController::store → sendRemittance (email if owner has email + in-app if owner has a login) wrapped in try/catch + logged so a dispatch failure NEVER 500s an already-recorded payout (no duplicate re-record). advice() resend route (throttle:notification-send; voided/no-email/foreign-owner guards). PropertyOwnerController::emailStatement → in-app owner_statement_sent notice.

findings.title: owner notifications page + badge + dev login
findings.detail: OwnerPortalNotificationsController (index/markAsRead/markAllAsRead, recipient_id=auth, isOwner-gated, 403 on another user's notice) + owner-portal.notifications routes + Owner/Notifications.vue (mirrors tenant: optimistic mark-read + revert/log, filters, empty-state). AuthenticatedLayout owner nav 'Notifications' + unread badge; HandleInertiaRequests getNavBadges owner case. Lang en/sw/ar (owners.notifications.*, portal.notifications_title, payouts notify/email keys, messages payout_*). DevelopmentSeeder: a seeded owner@propmanager.test login linked to the Demo Property (10% fee, real payments, payouts, notifications) so the owner portal is usable immediately.

closeout.result: 3/3 findings pass — zero deferrals. Phase 4 of the owner / PM-company model: proactive owner comms (remittance advice + in-app notifications) + a seeded owner dev login.
closeout.summary: Makes the owner relationship proactive. (1) TYPES: notifications.type ENUM widened + 2 opt-out preference columns + NotificationService::notifyInApp() — a public in-app-ONLY dispatch so a notice never double-emails the document; gates canReceive on an EXISTING preference but defaults-on for a brand-new one (avoids silently dropping a new owner's first notice); landlordId passed explicitly (resolveLandlordId returns the recipient's own id for non-tenants). (2) REMITTANCE: OwnerPayoutMail (PDF, mirrors OwnerStatementMail) emailed on payout record (if owner has email) + an in-app owner_payout_sent (if owner has a login) + a resend route; emailStatement also drops an in-app owner_statement_sent. The dispatch is wrapped in try/catch + logged so it can NEVER 500 an already-recorded payout (no duplicate re-record). (3) SURFACE: an owner notifications page (mirrors tenant) + unread nav badge (getNavBadges owner case) + lang en/sw/ar; plus a seeded owner@propmanager.test dev login wired to the Demo Property (10% fee, real payments, payouts, notices) so the portal has data immediately.
closeout.review: Full 3-agent multi-reviewer pass (CodeRabbit + pr-review code-reviewer + silent-failure-hunter) — all three executed for real (33/42/31 tool-uses, cited lines). Convergent verdict: NO CRITICAL; the priority areas confirmed + tested: no-double-email (notifyInApp hard-codes in_app, never the email path), explicit landlordId for the owner recipient, owner-only scoping (page/markRead/badge bound to recipient_id=auth, 403 on a foreign notice), resilience (login-less/email-less owner still records). FIXED from the silent-failure hunt: HIGH the remittance dispatch ran after the payout was committed and was unisolated — a summary()/Mail::queue(broker down)/dangling-user findOrFail throw would 500 an already-recorded payout → manager re-records a duplicate → wrapped sendRemittance in try/catch + log (recording is the source of truth, dispatch is best-effort). DESIGN CHANGE from the reviewed draft: the first attempt fixed the brand-new-preference null-default via NotificationPreference::getOrCreate()->refresh() — that BROKE the shared notification path (ModelNotFoundException, caught by regression) so it was reverted; the final fix gates canReceive only on a non-recently-created preference inside notifyInApp (defaults-on for a fresh row), which is local + tested. Mailable failed() handlers present on both OwnerPayoutMail + OwnerStatementMail. Accepted: opted-out return swallowed at call sites (the email is the real document; in-app is the companion).
closeout.tests: Phase104OwnerRemittanceNotifyTest 12 (payout→advice email + in-app; login-less→record-no-in-app; email-less→record-no-email; opt-out→no in-app; resend + voided/foreign guards; statement→in-app; owner notifications page own-only + mark-read-not-anothers + mark-all + non-owner-403). Owner regression GREEN with Phase-104 in place: Phase103OwnerPayouts + Phase104 = 28 passed/70 assertions; Phase35NotificationPreference + PostCommitNotification + Phase101OwnerFoundation all green in the same batch. Gates: Pint 19 files, eslint 0 errors, nav-audit clean (owner-portal.notifications nav-linked), check-import-case/exists OK, vite build exit 0, lang parity en/sw/ar owners.php 110 keys each + emails.subjects.owner_payout_advice. New migration → dev DB migrated; DevelopmentSeeder run (owner@propmanager.test ready). PRE-EXISTING (NOT Phase-104): tests/Feature/NotificationsTest 20/20 fail with ModelNotFoundException on the CLEAN baseline (verified via git stash) — flagged to the user, who asked to fix them next as a dedicated follow-up.
closeout.constraints_preserved: The companion in-app notice is IN-APP ONLY — the payout/statement each send exactly one email (their dedicated PDF mailable). Recording a payout NEVER fails because dispatch fails (try/catch + log). landlordId always explicit for owner notifications. Owner notifications scoped strictly to recipient_id=auth (page + mark-read + badge); 403 on a foreign notice. Owner notification preferences default ON + are respected (canReceive) for an existing pref. Login-less / email-less owners still record + are discoverable in the portal. Deferred: a dedicated owner notification-PREFERENCES toggle UI (the dispatch already respects defaults; building a settings surface for the role is a later increment); owner payout receipts beyond the remittance advice; the broader pre-existing NotificationsTest fix (next, user-requested).
